queries.question: Which terminals have frequent flyer lounges with complimentary Wi-Fi and which terminals have VIP lounges with the same amenity?
queries.sql:
SELECT Terminal.Name 
FROM ExclusiveArea JOIN AreaAmenityMap ON ExclusiveArea.areaId = AreaAmenityMap.areaId JOIN Amenity ON AreaAmenityMap.amenityId = Amenity.amenityId JOIN Terminal ON Terminal.id = ExclusiveArea.terminalid WHERE ExclusiveArea.exclusiveAreaValue = "Frequent Flyer Lounge" AND Amenity.amenityValue = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"
UNION
SELECT Terminal.Name 
FROM ExclusiveArea JOIN AreaAmenityMap ON ExclusiveArea.areaId = AreaAmenityMap.areaId JOIN Amenity ON AreaAmenityMap.amenityId = Amenity.amenityId JOIN Terminal ON Terminal.id = ExclusiveArea.terminalid
WHERE ExclusiveArea.exclusiveAreaValue = "VIP Lounge" AND Amenity.amenityValue = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?areaamenitymap a :AreaAmenityMap .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasExclusiveArea ?exclusivearea .
    ?amenity a :Amenity .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasAmenity ?amenity .
    ?terminal a :Terminals .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    ?amenity p:amenityValue ?amenityvalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "Frequent Flyer Lounge")
    FILTER(STR(?amenityvalue_f) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?areaamenitymap a :AreaAmenityMap .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasExclusiveArea ?exclusivearea .
    ?amenity a :Amenity .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasAmenity ?amenity .
    ?terminal a :Terminals .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    ?amenity p:amenityValue ?amenityvalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "VIP Lounge")
    FILTER(STR(?amenityvalue_f) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show terminals that have frequent flyer lounges and VIP lounges with complimentary Wi-Fi.
queries.sql:
SELECT Terminal.Name 
FROM Terminal JOIN ExclusiveArea ON Terminal.id = ExclusiveArea.terminalId WHERE ExclusiveArea.exclusiveAreaValue = "Frequent Flyer Lounge"
UNION
SELECT Terminal.Name 
FROM ExclusiveArea JOIN AreaAmenityMap ON ExclusiveArea.areaId = AreaAmenityMap.areaId JOIN Amenity ON AreaAmenityMap.amenityId = Amenity.amenityId JOIN Terminal ON Terminal.id = ExclusiveArea.terminalid
WHERE ExclusiveArea.exclusiveAreaValue = "VIP Lounge" AND Amenity.amenityValue = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {

    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "Frequent Flyer Lounge")

  }
  UNION
  {
    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?areaamenitymap a :AreaAmenityMap .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasExclusiveArea ?exclusivearea .
    ?amenity a :Amenity .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasAmenity ?amenity .
    ?terminal a :Terminals .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    ?amenity p:amenityValue ?amenityvalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "VIP Lounge")
    FILTER(STR(?amenityvalue_f) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi")

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show terminals that have frequent flyer lounges and VIP lounges with complimentary Wi-Fi.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?areaamenitymap a :AreaAmenityMap .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasExclusiveArea ?exclusivearea .
    ?amenity a :Amenity .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasAmenity ?amenity .
    ?terminal a :Terminals .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    ?amenity p:amenityValue ?amenityvalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "Frequent Flyer Lounge")
    FILTER(STR(?amenityvalue_f) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?areaamenitymap a :AreaAmenityMap .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasExclusiveArea ?exclusivearea .
    ?amenity a :Amenity .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasAmenity ?amenity .
    ?terminal a :Terminals .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    ?amenity p:amenityValue ?amenityvalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "VIP Lounge")
    FILTER(STR(?amenityvalue_f) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
} }
  low: { SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?terminal a :Terminals .
    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "Frequent Flyer Lounge")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?exclusivearea a :ExclusiveArea .
    ?areaamenitymap a :AreaAmenityMap .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasExclusiveArea ?exclusivearea .
    ?amenity a :Amenity .
    ?areaamenitymap p:hasAmenity ?amenity .
    ?terminal a :Terminals .
    ?exclusivearea p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
    ?terminal p:name ?name .
    ?exclusivearea p:exclusiveAreaValue ?exclusiveareavalue_f .
    ?amenity p:amenityValue ?amenityvalue_f .
    FILTER(STR(?exclusiveareavalue_f) = "VIP Lounge")
    FILTER(STR(?amenityvalue_f) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
} }
}
